PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) WHERE {
  wd:Q10608114 wdt:P166 ?award ; wdt:P393 ?seasonCode .
  ?award wdt:P585 ?date ; rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "national championship") && LANG(?label) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
